overall.description: A player character in Red Dead Redemption 2 cooks venison over a campfire in a grassy wilderness clearing surrounded by pine trees and misty mountains. The clip shows the entire cooking interaction from rotating the spit to removing the cooked meat.

scene_state.functional_zone: wilderness campfire site in grassy clearing

events.description: character removes the cooked venison from the spit, completing the cooking process

agents.ego_description: crouching by the campfire and rotating the spit to cook the venison, then lifting the cooked meat to eat

entered.detail: small campfire with flames and a cooking spit holding meat
tall pine trees forming the forest edge to the left
tall pine trees forming the forest edge to the right
grassy ground with patches of dirt and small rocks
misty mountain range visible through the atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The character crouches beside a campfire in an open grassy clearing surrounded by pine forest and distant misty mountains. He rotates a spit with venison over the flames, then removes the cooked meat to eat while the camera maintains a steady third-person view of the cooking action.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady third-person perspective of a character preparing a meal in a serene, misty wilderness. It begins with the character crouching beside a crackling campfire set within an open grassy clearing, framed by a dense pine forest and distant, fog-shrouded mountains. As the action unfolds, the camera remains fixed on the character as he carefully rotates a spit of venison over the dancing flames. The scene then concludes as the meat is fully cooked and removed from the heat to be eaten, while the surrounding wilderness remains still under the soft, hazy light.
